title: Bethphage #0967
definition:
Bethphage = "house of unripe figs"

 1) the name of a hamlet between Jericho and Jerusalem, close to Bethany
nasbUsage:
Definition: Bethphage = "house of unripe figs"

 1) the name of a hamlet between Jericho and Jerusalem, close to Bethany

    NASB:  house of unripe figs,  Bethphage, a village on the Mt. of Olives:
